subtitles.original: My karaoke streams and streams where I'm singing my stuff
subtitles.english: My karaoke streams and streams where I'm singing my stuff

subtitles.original: and, uh, future shows.
subtitles.english: and, uh, future shows.

subtitles.original: If there's a song that you really want to hear, like I know a lot of you probably wanted to hear Shuten, for example. So...
subtitles.english: If there's a song that you really want to hear, like I know a lot of you probably wanted to hear Shuten, for example. So...

subtitles.original: If you want to hear it, you got to stay tuned and come to the next one.
subtitles.english: If you want to hear it, you got to stay tuned and come to the next one.

subtitles.original: Like I said, life has no encore.
subtitles.english: Like I said, life has no encore.

subtitles.original: So, um...
subtitles.english: So, um...

subtitles.original: what I want you to do now is just rewatch the live.
subtitles.english: what I want you to do now is just rewatch the live.

subtitles.original: And then go listen to the music. Links in the description.
subtitles.english: And then go listen to the music. Links in the description.

subtitles.original: Thank you, Dead Beats, always for cheering for me.
subtitles.english: Thank you, Dead Beats, always for cheering for me.

subtitles.original: Thank you for supporting what I do.
subtitles.english: Thank you for supporting what I do.

subtitles.original: I'm strange, but you know...
subtitles.english: I'm strange, but you know...

subtitles.original: this is really fun. I'm glad I get to do this every day.
subtitles.english: this is really fun. I'm glad I get to do this every day.

subtitles.original: And I put my whole heart into the new release. So...
subtitles.english: And I put my whole heart into the new release. So...

subtitles.original: I'll see you guys tomorrow. We're playing a game.
subtitles.english: I'll see you guys tomorrow. We're playing a game.

subtitles.original: There's, there's a game stream tomorrow.
subtitles.english: There's, there's a game stream tomorrow.

subtitles.original: See you guys around. Thanks again, everyone!
subtitles.english: See you guys around. Thanks again, everyone!

subtitles.original: I'm Mori, hope you'll remember me.
subtitles.english: I'm Mori, hope you'll remember me.

subtitles.original: Peace!
subtitles.english: Peace!

subtitles.original: [Title: DISASTER SHOW - Mori Calliope]

subtitles.english: [Title: DISASTERPIECE - Mori Calliope]

subtitles.original: Orpheus, time's a wasting...
subtitles.english: Orpheus, time's a wasting...

subtitles.original: Tonight, it's my turn to show you how obvious I can be
subtitles.english: Tonight, it's my turn to show you how obvious I can be

subtitles.original: Sometimes it feels like you're playing that guitar for me and only me
subtitles.english: Sometimes it feels like you're playing that guitar for me and only me
